parent.bodySetup: Create a passcode. Adults can use it later to change settings.
parent.bodyUnlock: Enter the passcode to open settings.
parent.title: Adults only
parent.body: Please ask an adult to take over for a moment. For safety, a quick confirmation is required.
parent.error: That’s not correct. Please try again.
parent.descriptionSetup: Please ask an adult to take over for a moment. For safety, a quick confirmation is required.
parent.errorSetup: That’s not correct. Please try again.

adult.title: Adult settings
adult.subtitle: Manage adult settings here.
adult.locked: This section is protected. Please unlock it in your profile.

ai.title: AI settings
ai.modeIntro: You can find the AI mode in the adult settings.

owlMode.help: Define how Amy should work in the app.
owlMode.label: Amy mode

on.title: On
on.text: The AI is active and supports reflection moments in the story. It responds contextually – not constantly, but where it is pedagogically meaningful. On older or less powerful devices, it may respond more slowly.

auto.title: Auto
auto.text: The AI supports only when it is useful and technically stable. This is the recommended setting for most devices.

off.title: Off
off.text: The AI is turned off. The story still works fully and remains pedagogically sound – just without AI reflection prompts.

ai.changeHint: You can change the mode at any time.
ai.performanceHint: If the app responds slowly or takes longer to load, we recommend “Auto” or “Off”.

hint.title: Talk to an adult briefly
hint.body: Please talk to a trusted adult for a moment and then try again.

unlock.title: Unlock code
unlock.description: If you have received an unlock code, you can enter it here.

testMode.title: Test mode
testMode.description: For development, internal testing, and pilot phases.

global.title: Global unlock
global.description: Removes daily and weekly limits as well as chapter locks.
global.label: Unlock all content

reset.title: Reset
reset.description: Helpful if you want to restart a test run cleanly.
reset.sessionDone: The current session has been reset.
